metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for dangernoodle-io projects

plugins.name: ouroboros-mcp
plugins.description: Project knowledge base and backlog management. Persist decisions, facts, and notes across conversations. Track work items, plans, and project configuration.

plugins.name: espidf-clangd-lsp
plugins.description: clangd LSP preconfigured for ESP-IDF (ESP32 xtensa + riscv32) C/C++ development. Zero-config toolchain trust via --query-driver globs.

plugins.name: pogopin-mcp
plugins.description: Embedded development MCP server — serial monitoring, ESP-IDF flashing, NVS management, and crash decode.
